nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-headed tailorbird
nodes.summary: Black-headed tailorbird（Black-headed tailorbird，学名 Orthotomus nigriceps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: Pantaron Mountain Range
nodes.summary: Pantaron Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-headed tailorbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Endemic Bird Area
nodes.summary: Endemic Bird Area是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括White-winged tapaculo、Satin berrypecker、Black-headed tailorbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense undergrowth in lowland forests at elevations of up to and is non-migratory. A 2021 study of avian biodiversity near Mount Pantaron in Bukidnon found that the black-headed tailorbird, like other Philippine endemics, was absent from agricultural ecosystems but present in nearby montane forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the Mindanao and the Eastern Visayas Endemic Bird Area; no threats to the species are known

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense undergrowth in lowland forests at elevations of up to and is non-migratory. A 2021 study of avian biodiversity near Mount Pantaron in Bukidnon found that the black-headed tailorbird, like other Philippine endemics, was absent from agricultural ecosystems but present in nearby montane forests
